topic: Case study: encoding comparison on high-cardinality data
key_concepts: Summarizing encoding application with a predictive study of retail pricing across zip codes.
One-hot processing fails rapidly blowing the model vector space into thousands of useless columns.
Hashing controls limits but impacts accuracy owing to internal string collisions.
Target encoding and entity embedding demonstrate the strongest performance, showing dense values yield superior validation without expanding feature boundaries.

figures.caption: Akurasi perbandingan ragam teknik encoding pada dataset dengan kardinalitas tinggi
figures.description: Chart comparing accuracy across One-Hot, Hashing, and Target Encoding handling thousands of distinct labels.
